data.content: Implemented the periodic startup upgrade notice by extracting shared release-version helpers, adding a global 24h throttled upgrade-check state file, wiring the stderr banner into main before dispatch, and covering the new paths with unit plus subprocess CLI tests using a stubbed curl binary. Branch: knots-5403-upgrade-banner. Verified with make install-hooks and make sanity (95.05% coverage). Commits: 3839a55ed7b1, c18ebb5b0f3f.
